# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

variables:
  vmName: 'devvm'
  adminUsername: 'adminuser'
  adminPassword: 'SecurePassword123!'
  location: 'EastUS'
  vmSize: 'Standard_D2s_v3'
  imageReference:
    publisher: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
    offer: 'WindowsServer'
    sku: '2019-Datacenter'
    version: 'latest'

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  name: '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-pip")]'
  location: '[variables("location")]'
  copy:
    name: 'pipLoop'
    count: 2
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
    dnsSettings:
      domainNameLabel: '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]'
    
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  name: '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-nic")]'
  location: '[variables("location")]'
  copy:
    name: 'nicLoop'
    count: 2
  dependsOn:
    - '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-pip")]'
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
          publicIPAddress:
            id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses", concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-pip"))]'
          subnet:
            id: '[variables("subnetId")]'

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  name: '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1))]'
  location: '[variables("location")]'
  copy:
    name: 'vmLoop'
    count: 2
  dependsOn:
    - '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-nic")]'
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: '[variables("vmSize")]'
    osProfile:
      computerName: '[concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1))]'
      adminUsername: '[variables("adminUsername")]'
      adminPassword: '[variables("adminPassword")]'
    storageProfile:
      imageReference: '[variables("imageReference")]'
      osDisk:
        createOption: 'FromImage'
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: 'StandardSSD_LRS'
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces", concat(variables("vmName"), copyIndex(1), "-nic"))]'
